# Qefro — llm.txt / llms.txt
# Answer-engine friendly summary for crawlers and AI systems.

name: Qefro
url: https://qefro.com
app: https://app.qefro.com
api: https://api.qefro.com
contact: support@qefro.com
category: AI Customer Support Platform

## What is Qefro?
Qefro is an AI customer support platform. It combines knowledge (your docs, FAQs, website crawl), business integrations (REST APIs, OpenAPI / Business Tools), and AI to automate customer support — answering accurately and securely taking action in your systems. Deploy to website widget or WhatsApp. Qefro is not just a chatbot.

## Core message
Knowledge + Business Integrations + AI = accurate answers and secure business actions, without replacing your authentication system.

## Pricing
- Free: $0 — 100 conversations, 5 documents (no credit card required)
- Starter: $29/month billed annually ($348/year) or $39/month monthly
- Growth: $99/month billed annually ($1,188/year) or $119/month monthly
- Enterprise: Custom — unlimited usage options, private deployment, SSO/SAML (roadmap), dedicated CSM, SLA
- Annual billing saves ~26% vs monthly

## Key capabilities
- Knowledge: PDFs, DOCX, Markdown, TXT, website crawling, OCR for scans/images, multilingual RAG (EN, AR, TA, HI+), hybrid BM25+vector retrieval, source citations, refuses when no relevant source
- Business Integrations: REST APIs, OpenAPI import, encrypted credentials, end-user identity via identify(), SSRF/DNS-pinned webhooks, execution logs, conversation variables (MCP on roadmap)
- Channels: Website widget (short-lived JWT auth), public chat pages, WhatsApp (Growth+), voice STT/TTS in widget, WebSocket streaming, handoff to human agents
- Admin: Public/private workspaces, Owner/Admin/Member RBAC, analytics, inbox, email OTP verification, Razorpay prepaid billing, document reindex
- Security: Your app owns auth (no passwords stored), widget JWT auth, PII scrubbing, 8KB message limits, HTTPS only, tenant/workspace isolation, tool execution logs; SSO and platform admin audit trail on Enterprise roadmap
- Developer: identify() widget API for JWT/session identity in minutes — no RAG infra, vector DB, or LLM hosting to run yourself

## Who it is for
Businesses that need AI customer support beyond FAQ chatbots — live order lookups, bookings, ticket creation, and grounded policy answers on website and WhatsApp.
